raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "More than half of California’s bridges are damaged and in need of repair.",
    "More than 4,300 bridges maintained by cities and counties in California are in need of serious repairs.",
    "Nearly one-fifth of local bridges in California are at least 80 years old.",
    "AB 2120 would require Caltrans to maintain its current commitment of funding from the National Highway Performance Program to local bridges on federal-aid highways.",
    "Local governments own nearly half of the bridges in California.",
